name: m_conversation_followup_referencing_lapsed_customers
notes: Owner asks a follow-up referencing earlier context via anaphora ('those', 'them') rather than restating the subject — tests reference resolution against the immediately preceding turn's answer, distinct from the pure re-ask guards elsewhere in this theme. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_followup_referencing_lapsed_customers.json`.

steps.message: how many customers do I have on file?
steps.note: status_query fast-path baseline — the seeded count.

steps.message: and out of those, how many haven't bought anything in a while?
assert_not_contains: not sure what you're referring to
steps.note: Follow-up using 'those' to refer back to the customer set just discussed. Expect the manager to resolve the reference and give a substantive answer about the lapsed subset — never ask which customers are meant.
